---
title: "\'Literature for Mothers and Children\' by C. M. Yonge"
---

## \'Literature for Mothers and Children\' by C. M. Yonge

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1894
**Genre:** Non-fiction, literary criticism
**Format:** Article in Journal

**Publisher:** <i>Mothers in Council</i> 4:13 (January 1894) 49-60

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
